description: Linos Perros wallets in a rich-toned classic hue for the conservative at heart. This understated classy piece in coffee brown holds all your essentials comfortably with its many convenient compartments. Styled to Fit in your hand bag, this wallet will look good even if carried solo, like a purse.Length: 18.5 cmWidth: 8.5 cmDepth: 1 cmBright gold sliders and branded zippersLeather upper with embossed letters of the brandTwo separators (one zippered of the two)Four card slots and one pocket on either side of the walletCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
